mapper.select: SELECT * FROM study_check_task_item WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE

SELECT ti.task_id, ti.id AS task_item_id, ti.question_id, t.task_name, t.check_mode, c.category_name, ti.question_title_snapshot AS question_title, ti.final_score, ti.score_pass_mark, ti.self_assessment_result, ti.submit_time FROM study_check_task_item ti INNER JOIN study_check_task t ON t.id = ti.task_id LEFT JOIN study_category c ON c.id = t.category_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.status IN (2, 3, 4) AND ti.final_score IS NOT NULL AND ti.final_score <= COALESCE(ti.score_pass_mark, 60) ORDER BY COALESCE(ti.submit_time, ti.update_time, ti.create_time) DESC, ti.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
